userStories.title: Add task status schema or migration
userStories.description: Add status column to tasks with default "pending" so tasks have persistent status.
acceptanceCriteria: Add status column to tasks table with default "pending"
API and models include status field

userStories.title: Backend: update task status action
userStories.description: Add backend endpoint/action to update task status from list and enforce valid values.

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: Display status as badge on task cards in list view.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows
userStories.description: Allow changing status inline from task list (dropdown or quick actions).
acceptanceCriteria: Control updates status via backend endpoint
Optimistic UI updates or loading state handled

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: Allow filtering task list by status with options All, Pending, In Progress, Done.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter UI present and filters results correctly
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
